sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ زُعَمَاءُ العَالَمِ فِي مَدِينَةِ جِنِيفَ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ السَّلَامِ الدَّوْلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Svjetski lideri sastali su se u Ženevi kako bi razgovarali o međunarodnom miru.
sentences.translationEn: World leaders met in Geneva to discuss international peace.

sentences.arabic: رَكَّزَ الِاجْتَمَعُ عَلَى حَلِّ النِّزَاعَاتِ عَنْ طَرِيقِ الحِوَارِ الدِّبْلُومَاسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sastanak se fokusirao na rješavanje sukoba putem diplomatskog dijaloga.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting focused on resolving conflicts through diplomatic dialogue.

sentences.arabic: اتَّفَقَ الحَاضِرُونَ عَلَى تَعْزِيزِ التَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ الدُّوَلِ لِمُوَاجَهَةِ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Prisutni su se složili da ojačaju saradnju između zemalja radi suočavanja s izazovima.
sentences.translationEn: The attendees agreed to strengthen cooperation between countries to face challenges.

sentences.arabic: شَدَّدَ الرَّئِيسُ فِي كَلِمَتِهِ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ الِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي المِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik je u svom govoru naglasio važnost stabilnosti u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: The President emphasized in his speech the importance of stability in the region.

sentences.arabic: انْتَهَى المُؤْتَمَرُ بِتَوْقِيعِ اتِّفَاقِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلأَمْنِ وَالتَّجَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Konferencija je završena potpisivanjem novog sporazuma o sigurnosti i trgovini.
sentences.translationEn: The conference ended with the signing of a new agreement for security and trade.
